extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the laptop hinge is broken and does not sit properly.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows the laptop's hinge area where the body is separated and the hinge appears broken.

result.user_claim: Customer: The laptop hinge area is damaged. | Support: What damage is visible? | Customer: The hinge looks broken and does not sit properly. | Support: Is the screen or keyboard part of this claim? | Customer: No, please review the hinge damage only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed hinge with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed hinge with visible broken_part. Supporting images: img_1.
